Aries.overview: The Moon in Libra moves through your solar 7th house today, emphasising partnerships, contracts, and mirrored dynamics. We are in a Waxing Crescent phase — energy builds toward expression and outward momentum. Transiting Mercury squares your Aries Sun — productive friction; adjust pace rather than forcing a clean win.
Aries.love: Partnership is in focus — clarity, fairness, and one honest conversation carry more weight than guessing. Venus in Virgo colours affection and aesthetics — lead with sincerity over spectacle.
Aries.career: Professional visibility is activated — deliver one polished piece of work and let competence speak. Mars in Gemini sets the pace of effort — direct drive wisely, not impatiently.
Aries.health: Build energy gradually — consistent movement and nourishment compound through the week. The Moon's passage through your 7th house suggests tending partnerships, contracts, and mirrored dynamics supports body-mind balance.
Aries.weekly: This week the Moon travels through Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius relative to the sky. Jupiter in Leo (your solar house 5) expands romance, creativity, and wholehearted play. Saturn in Aries asks for patience in identity, vitality, and first impressions. For your personal chart, open transits.html.
Aries.methodNote: Solar-chart horoscope: whole-sign houses from your Sun sign, computed from VSOP87 ephemeris at local noon. For your full natal chart see transits.html.

transits.text: Transiting Mercury squares your Aries Sun — productive friction; adjust pace rather than forcing a clean win.
Transiting Mars sextiles your Aries Sun — cooperative sky weather that eases effort in that area.
Transiting Saturn conjoins your Aries Sun — concentrated focus; one theme dominates the day.

Taurus.overview: The Moon in Libra moves through your solar 6th house today, emphasising health routines, craft, and daily service. We are in a Waxing Crescent phase — energy builds toward expression and outward momentum. Transiting Mercury sextiles your Taurus Sun — cooperative sky weather that eases effort in that area.
Taurus.love: Romance and creative chemistry run high — express affection directly and make room for spontaneity. Venus in Virgo colours affection and aesthetics — lead with sincerity over spectacle.
Taurus.career: Systems and craft win — refine the process, finish the backlog, and improve one routine permanently. Mars in Gemini sets the pace of effort — direct drive wisely, not impatiently.
Taurus.health: Build energy gradually — consistent movement and nourishment compound through the week. The Moon's passage through your 6th house suggests tending health routines, craft, and daily service supports body-mind balance.
Taurus.weekly: This week the Moon travels through Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius relative to the sky. Jupiter in Leo (your solar house 4) expands home, roots, and private emotional life. Saturn in Aries asks for patience in rest, reflection, and what works beneath the surface. For your personal chart, open transits.html.
Taurus.methodNote: Solar-chart horoscope: whole-sign houses from your Sun sign, computed from VSOP87 ephemeris at local noon. For your full natal chart see transits.html.
